description_long: This is an adult woman standing upright, dressed in a long-sleeved sweater featuring a graphic design on the front and a pair of high-waisted, loose-fitting trousers. She is wearing closed-toe heeled shoes and has her hair neatly styled back in a low bun. Her facial features are neutral, and her arms rest naturally at her sides. The sweater appears to be made of a soft, knit fabric, while the trousers have a slightly textured, woven look. The overall appearance is casual yet tidy, suitable for an urban environment such as a sidewalk or park. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman stands upright in casual attire, wearing a graphic sweater, loose trousers, and heeled shoes with her hair in a low bun. She appears relaxed and ready for an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic sweater, relaxed posture, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the side seam of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sweater, the fit of the trousers, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the natural arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sweater with a graphic design and loose-fitting trousers
attribute_hairstyle: hair pulled back in a low bun
